requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency / MEPS — Household Refrigerators (Ethiopia Energy-Efficiency Programme)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效/最低能效标准（MEPS）——家用电冰箱（埃塞俄比亚能效计划）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效/最低能效標準（MEPS）——家用電冰箱（衣索比亞能效計畫）

summary.en: Ethiopia operates an appliance energy-efficiency programme aimed at curbing electricity demand, under which Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) and energy-efficiency requirements can apply to imported appliances including refrigerators. Where applicable, the Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) adopts the relevant international test-method standard (the IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods) as the Ethiopian Standard for measuring energy consumption, and the programme sets MEPS thresholds and/or an energy-label/star-rating that refrigerators must meet to be imported and sold. Conformity is demonstrated through the CACEA/Ministry of Trade import-inspection regime via the in-country importer rather than an EU-style central product database. Unlike the EU, there is no EPREL-style mandatory pre-registration portal; energy parameters are typically verified through a test report (to IEC 62552) accompanying the import-inspection file. Exporters should confirm the current MEPS threshold and whether an energy label/star rating is required with the importer/ESA.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚实施旨在抑制电力需求的器具能效计划，依据该计划，最低能效标准（MEPS）及能效要求可适用于包括电冰箱在内的进口器具。在适用的情况下，埃塞俄比亚标准局（ESA）将相关国际试验方法标准（IEC 62552系列——家用制冷器具——特性与试验方法）采纳为埃塞俄比亚标准以测量耗电量，该计划设定电冰箱进口和销售须满足的MEPS门槛和/或能效标识/星级评定。符合性通过CACEA/贸易部进口检验制度经在地进口商证明，而非欧盟式中央产品数据库。与欧盟不同，不存在EPREL式强制预注册门户；能效参数通常通过随进口检验文件附带的检测报告（依据IEC 62552）核实。出口商应向进口商/ESA确认现行MEPS门槛及是否要求能效标识/星级评定。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞實施旨在抑制電力需求的器具能效計畫，依據該計畫，最低能效標準（MEPS）及能效要求可適用於包括電冰箱在內的進口器具。在適用的情況下，衣索比亞標準局（ESA）將相關國際試驗方法標準（IEC 62552系列——家用製冷器具——特性與試驗方法）採納為衣索比亞標準以測量耗電量，該計畫設定電冰箱進口和銷售須滿足的MEPS門檻和/或能效標識/星級評定。符合性通過CACEA/貿易部進口檢驗制度經在地進口商證明，而非歐盟式中央產品數據庫。與歐盟不同，不存在EPREL式強制預登記門戶；能效參數通常通過隨進口檢驗文件附帶的檢測報告（依據IEC 62552）核實。出口商應向進口商/ESA確認現行MEPS門檻及是否要求能效標識/星級評定。

standards_or_laws: Ethiopia appliance energy-efficiency programme — Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for refrigerating appliances (confirm current threshold with ESA/importer)
ES IEC 62552 series (Ethiopian Standard adopting IEC 62552-1/-2/-3) — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods
Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) — standards adoption; CACEA / Ministry of Trade and Regional Integration — import inspection / conformity

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), which sets energy-efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits. It is mandatory (GB), enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label administered under NDRC/SAMR. Chinese test methods are aligned with the IEC 62552 family via GB/T 8059-2016. Because Ethiopia, where it applies MEPS, also bases measurement on IEC 62552, a Chinese refrigerator's energy data is technically convertible — but China's Grade 1–5 scale and any Ethiopian MEPS/star threshold are different reference frameworks, so a Chinese energy grade does not automatically prove the Ethiopian MEPS threshold is met without checking the figures against the Ethiopian requirement.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，中国能效标识由NDRC/SAMR管理。中国试验方法通过GB/T 8059-2016与IEC 62552系列对齐。由于埃塞俄比亚在适用MEPS时同样以IEC 62552为测量基础，中国电冰箱的能效数据在技术上可换算——但中国1至5级体系与任何埃塞MEPS/星级门槛属不同参考框架，故中国能效等级不能在未对照埃塞要求核实数据的情况下自动证明满足埃塞MEPS门槛。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，中國能效標識由NDRC/SAMR管理。中國試驗方法通過GB/T 8059-2016與IEC 62552系列對齊。由於衣索比亞在適用MEPS時同樣以IEC 62552為測量基礎，中國電冰箱的能效數據在技術上可換算——但中國1至5級體系與任何衣索MEPS/星級門檻屬不同參考框架，故中國能效等級不能在未對照衣索要求核實數據的情況下自動證明滿足衣索MEPS門檻。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: The energy gap is lighter than the EU case but still real: (1) MEPS threshold check — where Ethiopia applies a refrigerator MEPS, the exporter must confirm the appliance's annual energy consumption / efficiency (measured to IEC 62552) meets the Ethiopian threshold; a Chinese Grade 1–5 rating is not a direct pass and must be cross-checked against the actual Ethiopian figure. (2) Test-report basis — an IEC 62552-based energy test report is the portable evidence; Chinese GB 12021.2 reports are technically aligned (both trace to IEC 62552) but should reference IEC 62552 to be readily accepted in the import-inspection file. (3) No EPREL equivalent — Ethiopia has no EU-style mandatory pre-registration database, so the burden is import-inspection documentation rather than online pre-registration. Confirm with the importer/ESA the exact current MEPS level and whether an energy label/star rating must be affixed.
gap.zh: 能效差距小于欧盟情形但仍真实存在：（1）MEPS门槛核对——在埃塞适用电冰箱MEPS的情况下，出口商须确认器具的年耗电量/能效（依据IEC 62552测量）满足埃塞门槛；中国1至5级评定不构成直接通过，须与实际埃塞数值交叉核对。（2）检测报告依据——基于IEC 62552的能效检测报告为可移植证据；中国GB 12021.2报告技术上对齐（两者均溯源至IEC 62552）但应引用IEC 62552以便在进口检验文件中被顺利接受。（3）无EPREL等效物——埃塞无欧盟式强制预注册数据库，故负担在于进口检验文件而非在线预注册。请向进口商/ESA确认现行确切的MEPS等级及是否须加贴能效标识/星级。
gap.zht: 能效差距小於歐盟情形但仍真實存在：（1）MEPS門檻核對——在衣索適用電冰箱MEPS的情況下，出口商須確認器具的年耗電量/能效（依據IEC 62552測量）滿足衣索門檻；中國1至5級評定不構成直接通過，須與實際衣索數值交叉核對。（2）檢測報告依據——基於IEC 62552的能效檢測報告為可移植證據；中國GB 12021.2報告技術上對齊（兩者均溯源至IEC 62552）但應引用IEC 62552以便在進口檢驗文件中被順利接受。（3）無EPREL等效物——衣索無歐盟式強制預登記數據庫，故負擔在於進口檢驗文件而非線上預登記。請向進口商/ESA確認現行確切的MEPS等級及是否須加貼能效標識/星級。

mandatory_status.target: Conditionally mandatory — where Ethiopia's appliance energy-efficiency programme sets a refrigerator MEPS/threshold, compliance (measured to ES IEC 62552) is required for import; verified through CACEA/Ministry of Trade import inspection via the importer, not an EPREL-style database. Confirm current threshold with ESA/importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: IEC 62552 series (base test-method standard adopted by ESA); Ethiopia appliance energy-efficiency programme via ESA / CACEA / Ministry of Trade

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where Ethiopia applies a refrigerator MEPS under its energy-efficiency programme, compliance is measured to the IEC 62552 series adopted as an Ethiopian Standard and verified through CACEA/Ministry of Trade import inspection — there is no EU-style EPREL pre-registration. A Chinese GB 12021.2 energy grade does not automatically prove the Ethiopian threshold; cross-check the IEC 62552 energy figures against the current Ethiopian MEPS and confirm any label/star-rating requirement with the importer/ESA.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在埃塞俄比亚依其能效计划适用电冰箱MEPS的情况下，符合性依据采纳为埃塞俄比亚标准的IEC 62552系列测量，并通过CACEA/贸易部进口检验核实——不存在欧盟式EPREL预注册。中国GB 12021.2能效等级不能自动证明满足埃塞门槛；请将IEC 62552能效数据与现行埃塞MEPS交叉核对，并向进口商/ESA确认任何标识/星级要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在衣索比亞依其能效計畫適用電冰箱MEPS的情況下，符合性依據採納為衣索比亞標準的IEC 62552系列測量，並通過CACEA/貿易部進口檢驗核實——不存在歐盟式EPREL預登記。中國GB 12021.2能效等級不能自動證明滿足衣索門檻；請將IEC 62552能效數據與現行衣索MEPS交叉核對，並向進口商/ESA確認任何標識/星級要求。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Label — Comparative-Energy Labelling for Refrigerators (Ethiopia vs China Energy Label)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——电冰箱比较能效标识（埃塞俄比亚 vs 中国能效标识）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——電冰箱比較能效標識（衣索比亞 vs 中國能效標識）

summary.en: As part of its energy-efficiency programme, Ethiopia may require a comparative energy-label or star-rating on imported refrigerators so consumers can compare efficiency, distinct from the MEPS pass/fail threshold. Where such labelling applies, the rating is derived from energy consumption measured to the ES-adopted IEC 62552 series, and the label format/content is set by the Ethiopian programme (via ESA / the energy authority). There is no EU-style EPREL central database backing the label and no EU A-to-G rescaled label; the label, if required, is verified within the CACEA/Ministry of Trade import-inspection file. Suppliers should confirm with the in-country importer whether a physical energy label/star rating must be affixed at the point of import or sale, the exact label design, and the local-language requirements. For radio-enabled smart refrigerators, any wireless functionality is separately handled by ECA type-approval and is unrelated to the energy label.
summary.zh: 作为能效计划的一部分，埃塞俄比亚可要求进口电冰箱加贴比较能效标识或星级评定，以便消费者比较能效，此与MEPS合格/不合格门槛不同。在适用此类标识的情况下，评级依据采纳为ES的IEC 62552系列所测量的耗电量得出，标识格式/内容由埃塞计划（经ESA/能源主管机构）设定。不存在欧盟式EPREL中央数据库支撑标识，也无欧盟A至G重定级标签；如要求标识，则在CACEA/贸易部进口检验文件内核实。供应商应向在地进口商确认是否须在进口或销售环节加贴实体能效标识/星级、确切标识设计及本地语言要求。对于带无线电的智能电冰箱，任何无线功能由ECA型号核准单独处理，与能效标识无关。
summary.zht: 作為能效計畫的一部分，衣索比亞可要求進口電冰箱加貼比較能效標識或星級評定，以便消費者比較能效，此與MEPS合格/不合格門檻不同。在適用此類標識的情況下，評級依據採納為ES的IEC 62552系列所測量的耗電量得出，標識格式/內容由衣索計畫（經ESA/能源主管機構）設定。不存在歐盟式EPREL中央數據庫支撐標識，也無歐盟A至G重定級標籤；如要求標識，則在CACEA/貿易部進口檢驗文件內核實。供應商應向在地進口商確認是否須在進口或銷售環節加貼實體能效標識/星級、確切標識設計及本地語言要求。對於帶無線電的智慧電冰箱，任何無線功能由ECA型號核准單獨處理，與能效標識無關。

standards_or_laws: Ethiopia appliance energy-efficiency programme — comparative energy label / star rating for refrigerators (confirm requirement and design with ESA/importer)
ES IEC 62552 series (Ethiopian Standard adopting IEC 62552) — measurement basis for the rating
No EPREL-style central registration database in Ethiopia; label verified within CACEA / Ministry of Trade import inspection

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision). The CEL displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum) and annual energy consumption, administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR, with manufacturers self-declaring the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing. There is no Chinese pre-registration database analogous to EU EPREL. The Chinese CEL and any Ethiopian comparative label/star rating are different label frameworks, so the Chinese label cannot be reused as the Ethiopian label even though both ultimately rest on IEC 62552-aligned measurement.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发展改革委/市场监管总局，2016年修订版）的中国能效标识（CEL）。CEL展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低）及年耗电量，由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理，制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级。中国无类似欧盟EPREL的预注册数据库。中国CEL与任何埃塞比较标识/星级属不同标识框架，故中国标识不能复用作埃塞标识，尽管两者最终均基于与IEC 62552对齐的测量。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發展改革委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂版）的中國能效標識（CEL）。CEL展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低）及年耗電量，由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理，製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級。中國無類似歐盟EPREL的預登記數據庫。中國CEL與任何衣索比較標識/星級屬不同標識框架，故中國標識不能複用作衣索標識，儘管兩者最終均基於與IEC 62552對齊的測量。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two practical points, both lighter than the EU EPREL gate: (1) Label substitution — where Ethiopia requires a comparative energy label/star rating, the Chinese CEL cannot serve as it; the rating must be derived under the Ethiopian programme from IEC 62552-measured data and presented in the required Ethiopian format/local language. (2) No pre-registration portal — unlike the EU's mandatory EPREL pre-registration, Ethiopia relies on the import-inspection documentation file, so there is no online database step; the energy data simply needs to be available to the importer/CACEA. Where Ethiopia does NOT mandate a consumer label for refrigerators, the MEPS threshold (row 001) is the operative requirement and this label row is informational only. Confirm the current labelling requirement, format, and local-language rules with the in-country importer/ESA.
gap.zh: 两个实务要点，均轻于欧盟EPREL门槛：（1）标识替换——在埃塞要求比较能效标识/星级的情况下，中国CEL不能充当之；评级须在埃塞计划下由IEC 62552测量数据得出，并以要求的埃塞格式/本地语言呈现。（2）无预注册门户——与欧盟强制EPREL预注册不同，埃塞依赖进口检验文件，故无在线数据库环节；能效数据只需向进口商/CACEA提供即可。在埃塞不强制要求电冰箱消费者标识的情况下，MEPS门槛（001行）为实际生效要求，本标识行仅供参考。请向在地进口商/ESA确认现行标识要求、格式及本地语言规则。
gap.zht: 兩個實務要點，均輕於歐盟EPREL門檻：（1）標識替換——在衣索要求比較能效標識/星級的情況下，中國CEL不能充當之；評級須在衣索計畫下由IEC 62552測量數據得出，並以要求的衣索格式/本地語言呈現。（2）無預登記門戶——與歐盟強制EPREL預登記不同，衣索依賴進口檢驗文件，故無線上數據庫環節；能效數據只需向進口商/CACEA提供即可。在衣索不強制要求電冰箱消費者標識的情況下，MEPS門檻（001行）為實際生效要求，本標識行僅供參考。請向在地進口商/ESA確認現行標識要求、格式及本地語言規則。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — a comparative energy label/star rating applies only where the Ethiopian energy-efficiency programme mandates one for refrigerators; verified within CACEA/Ministry of Trade import inspection. No EU-style EPREL pre-registration exists. Confirm requirement and format with ESA/importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: IEC 62552 series (rating measurement basis adopted as ES); Ethiopia appliance energy-efficiency programme via ESA / CACEA / Ministry of Trade

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where Ethiopia requires a comparative energy label/star rating for refrigerators, it is derived from IEC 62552-measured data under the Ethiopian programme and verified within CACEA import inspection — there is no EU-style EPREL pre-registration. The Chinese CEL cannot be reused as the Ethiopian label. Confirm whether a label is required, its format, and local-language rules with the in-country importer/ESA.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在埃塞俄比亚要求电冰箱比较能效标识/星级的情况下，其依据埃塞计划下IEC 62552测量数据得出，并在CACEA进口检验内核实——不存在欧盟式EPREL预注册。中国CEL不能复用作埃塞标识。请向在地进口商/ESA确认是否要求标识、其格式及本地语言规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在衣索比亞要求電冰箱比較能效標識/星級的情況下，其依據衣索計畫下IEC 62552測量數據得出，並在CACEA進口檢驗內核實——不存在歐盟式EPREL預登記。中國CEL不能複用作衣索標識。請向在地進口商/ESA確認是否要求標識、其格式及本地語言規則。
